Combat sport events in 2021
ONE: Winter Warriors
The poster for ONE: Winter Warriors
PromotionONE Championship
DateDecember 3, 2021 (2021-12-03)
VenueSingapore Indoor Stadium
CityKallang, Singapore
Event chronology
ONE: NextGen 3 ONE: Winter Warriors ONE: Winter Warriors II

ONE: Winter Warriors (also known as ONE 148: Eersel vs. Murtazaev) was a Combat sport event produced by ONE Championship that took place on December 3, 2021, at the Singapore Indoor Stadium in Kallang, Singapore.[1][2]

Background

[edit]

This event featured a kickboxing title fights. In the headline attraction, the reigning ONE Kickboxing Lightweight Champion Regian Eersel will defend his title for the fourth time against Islam Murtazaev.[3]

The co-main event featured the atomweight women's grand prix final between Stamp Fairtex and Ritu Phogat.[4]

Results

[edit]
Main Card (YouTube / ONE Super App)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight Kickboxing Regian Eersel (c) def. Islam Murtazaev Decision (split) 5 3:00 [a]
Women's Atomweight Stamp Fairtex def. Ritu Phogat Submission (armbar) 2 2:14 [b]
Bantamweight Kickboxing Hiroki Akimoto def. Qiu Jianliang Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Lightweight Dagi Arslanaliev def. Timofey Nastyukhin TKO (punches) 3 0:49
Heavyweight Marcus Almeida def. Kang Ji Won Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 2:27
Flyweight Yuya Wakamatsu def. Hu Yong Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the ONE Lightweight Kickboxing World Championship
  2. ^ ONE Women's Atomweight World Grand Prix Tournament Final

[5]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:[6]

  • MMA Fight of the Year 2021: Dagi Arslanaliev vs. Timofey Nastyukhin
  • $50,000 Performance of the Night: Dagi Arslanaliev, Timofey Nastyukhin

  2. ^ "Stamp Fairtex, Ritu Phogat will face each other in the ONE Women's Atomweight World Grand Prix Championship Final on December 3". Sportskeeda. 2021-11-26. Retrieved 23 April 2022.
  3. ^ Furness, Jay. "Who Is Lightweight Kickboxing World Title Challenger Islam Murtazaev?". msn.com. Retrieved 11 December 2021.
  4. ^ "ONE Championship announces full card for December 3; Ritu Phogat to face Stamp Fairtex in co-main even". malaysiasun.com. Retrieved 11 December 2021.
  5. ^ "ONE: Winter Warriors". ONE Championship – The Home of Martial Arts. 2 June 2021. Retrieved 26 November 2021.
  6. ^ "ONE Championship to award US$50,000 performance bonuses". South China Morning Post. 2022-01-12. Retrieved 2022-03-11.
